title: paronychia arabica subsp. breviseta
intro: Paronychia arabica subsp. breviseta is a plant species belonging to the Nyctaginaceae family, also known as the four o'clock or marvel of Peru plant. It is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of this plant include reducing fever, treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, and aiding in the relief of pain and inflammation. Herbal preparations of Paronychia arabica subsp. breviseta can be found in various forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to support immune function and promote overall well-being.
